root.name: sort_table_on_slide_10
root.description: Evaluates whether the table on slide 10 was sorted in ascending order by the first column and no extraneous changes were made.

children.name: table_sorting_correctness
children.description: Checks if the table data on slide 10 is sorted in ascending order based on the first column values.

children.name: no_extraneous_slide_10_changes
children.description: Checks that no unrelated elements on slide 10 were added, removed, or changed.

children.name: no_changes_outside_slide_10
children.description: Checks that no slides other than slide 10 were changed in any way.

metadata.task: Sort the table data on slide 10 in ascending order based on the first column values
